edited.speaker: Pablo
edited.text: Golanthus is talking with War Council members while the spiders subtly move things across his desk. He looks down, watches them slowly shift items from one side to the other, and shouts, "Enough!" The spiders scatter down the tables. He shouts something in Ekujae—basically, "Bring the two fools in." Two young guard soldiers approach you and say he is calling for you both, and bring you all in. Very quickly he marks you as White Marks. An old woman—the speaker for the Keeper of the Tree of Stories—is there. She hastily puts a white chalky symbol on each of your foreheads, looks at Kadira, and says they are White Mark now. You are, for all intents and purposes, their charge—their mother. If they do anything, you will suffer the consequences too, including being put to death. If they commit any crimes, you are also responsible for them. She waits for any argument.
